---
applyTo: ".github/lessons/*.md"
description: "Use when editing shared or agent lesson files. Keep lessons concise, useful, and easy to re-read before responding."
---

# Lessons File Instructions

- Keep lesson entries short and concrete.
- Record repeated mistakes, useful fixes, user wishes, and important resolutions.
- Prefer writing lessons that generalize across future tasks.
- If a lesson file gets too long, condense it and remove low-value detail.
- Keep the shared lessons file as the broad memory source and per-agent lesson files as the narrow source.
